PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSE, CALVIN TSE, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNEZ, REBEN ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR $10,908.48 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,908.48, ON AMENDED AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: DEFENDANTS TO PAY CALVIN TSE $6000, PATRICK TSE $1200, AND $3708.48 AS TO BOTH PLAINTIFFS. STATURORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
